title: A Ridin' Romeo
writer: George Marshall, Tom Mix, Ralph Spence
actors: Tom Mix, Rhea Mitchell, Pat Chrisman
plot: King Brentwood, who is accused of breach of promise by a local widow, is opposed to Jim Rose as a suitor for his daughter, Mabel, and bans him from the ranch. Learning the widow is to pay him a visit, Brentwood orders his men to h...
